name: Sour Cream Anise Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: TASTE OF HOME, DEC/JAN 1996
In a mixing bowl, cream shortening and sugar. Add the honey, sour cream and eggs; beat well. Combine flour, baking soda, aniseed, and salt; add to the creamed mixture and mix until smooth. Drop by teaspoon about 2 inches apart onto greased baking sheets. Bake at 350 degrees for 12-15 minutes or until lightly browned. Cool on a wire rack. Yield: about 8 dozen.
